description: Style Note Join style brigade with this pair of jeggings from wrangler. A season essential, this pair tapers beautifully at the hem, contours your hips and feels too good to be true! With a fashion-friendly cut that's also super comfy, we can't think of enough reasons you should buy this piece!Product Details Black jeggings, has a button and zipper closure at the front, two mock pockets at the sides,  two patch pockets at the back and branding in Swarovski elements at the back pocketMaterial and Care Cotton-spandexMachine wash cool with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Use cool ironSize and FitSkinny fit, low waistThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
